headline: With Netflix new ad-free standard plan at $20, streaming's tipping point into old TV is getting closer
summary: The economics of streaming are nearing the point where cheaper plans with ads make as much if not more money for services like Netflix.

headline: Comcast: Market Is Ignoring A 14% Yield Opportunity
summary: Comcast is a strong buy at 7.1x P/E as Peacock nears profit and high yields offset Q1 connectivity risks. Learn more on CMCSA stock here.
